an10.80:1.1: “There are these ten ways of subduing hatred.
an10.80:1.3: [1] “Thinking, ‘He has done me harm. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.4: [2] “Thinking, ‘He is doing me harm. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.5: [3] “Thinking, ‘He is going to do me harm. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.6: [4] “Thinking, ‘He has done harm to people who are dear & pleasing to me. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.7: [5] “Thinking, ‘He is doing harm to people who are dear & pleasing to me. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.8: [6] “Thinking, ‘He is going to do harm to people who are dear & pleasing to me. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.9: [7] “Thinking, ‘He has aided people who are not dear or pleasing to me. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred. [8] “Thinking, ‘He is aiding people who are not dear or pleasing to me. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.10: [9] “Thinking, ‘He is going to aid people who are not dear or pleasing to me. But what should I expect?’ one subdues hatred.
an10.80:1.11: [10] “One does not get worked up over impossibilities.
an10.80:1.12: “These are ten ways of subduing hatred.”
